items.name: Ontario Standard Form Lease
items.subtitle: Form 2229E — Residential Tenancy Agreement
items.description: Mandatory standard lease for most private residential tenancies in Ontario, signed on or after March 1, 2021.

items.name: British Columbia Residential Tenancy Agreement
items.subtitle: RTB-1 — Residential Tenancy Branch
items.description: Standard residential tenancy agreement issued by the BC Residential Tenancy Branch.

categories.name: Vehicles
categories.description: Bills of sale and ownership transfers, by province

items.name: British Columbia Vehicle Transfer/Tax Form
items.subtitle: APV9T — ICBC
items.description: Required form when selling a used vehicle in British Columbia. Both buyer and seller signatures required.

items.name: Saskatchewan Bill of Sale / Letter of Gift
items.subtitle: SGI
items.description: SGI-issued bill of sale for vehicle ownership transfer. Includes PST exemption fields for qualifying family transfers.

items.name: Manitoba Bill of Sale
items.subtitle: MPI Sample
items.description: Manitoba Public Insurance bill of sale sample. Required for vehicle registration following a private sale.
